passer_rating_allowed_z.what: QB rating when targeting this CB. The classic CB stat — captures completion %, yards, TDs, INTs in one number.
passer_rating_allowed_z.how: PFR season-level passer rating allowed, z-scored across the league pool with sign inverted so positive = good (lower rating allowed).
passer_rating_allowed_z.limits: Volume-dependent in small samples. PFR's chart, not PFF's — they sometimes diverge.

completion_pct_allowed_z.what: % of passes completed when this CB was targeted. Lower is better.
completion_pct_allowed_z.how: PFR cmp_percent allowed; z-score inverted so positive = better.
completion_pct_allowed_z.limits: Doesn't account for play design or who else is on the field.

yards_per_target_allowed_z.what: Yards allowed per target. Lower is better.
yards_per_target_allowed_z.limits: YAC after the catch is largely defender-team responsibility, not just this CB.

targets_per_game_z.what: How often opponents threw at this CB.
targets_per_game_z.limits: High volume can mean 'weak link picked on' OR 'most-targeted side of the field' — context matters.

avg_depth_of_target_z.what: Average depth of target on plays where this CB was the nearest defender.
avg_depth_of_target_z.limits: Depth = pre-snap matchup. Slot CBs see shorter targets than boundary CBs.

missed_tackle_pct_z.what: % of tackle attempts that were missed. Lower is better.
missed_tackle_pct_z.how: PFR missed_tackle_pct, z-score inverted so positive = reliable tackler.
missed_tackle_pct_z.limits: PFR scoring; not always identical to PFF's.
